build.buildCommand: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prod=false && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && BASE_PATH=/ PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @workspace/personal-brand run build && BASE_PATH=/marketing-os/ PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @workspace/marketing-os run build && BASE_PATH=/pitch-deck/ PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @workspace/pitch-deck run build && BASE_PATH=/__mockup/ PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox run build
